creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Only with ath(4) as an AP I see a lot/regular:

wlan99: [ac:b5:7d:e4:bd:23] AES-CCM replay detected tid 0 <rsc 1957759 (1ddf7f), csc 1957765 (1ddf85), keyix 0 rxkeyix 65535>

Card is an:
ath0@pci0:1:0:0:        class=0x028000 rev=0x01 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x168c device=0x0034 subvendor=0x11ad subdevice=0x6611
    vendor     = 'Qualcomm Atheros'
    device     = 'AR9462 Wireless Network Adapter'


and 11a only though it seems we don't actually respect that...

media: IEEE 802.11 Wireless Ethernet autoselect mode 11a <hostap>
